strengths: Extensive polyglot experience across multiple languages (JS/TS, D, Swift, C++, etc.) with full-stack and embedded systems exposure
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain open-source platforms (e.g., GISCollective) and contribute to AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq)
Strong engineering craftsmanship with emphasis on test-driven development, CI/CD, and performance optimization in high-throughput systems
concerns: Lacks the 15+ years of post-bachelor experience required by the job description (only ~12 years since first degree)
No advanced AI-related degree (Master's/PhD) and limited direct experience with cloud-native AI platform development
Recent career gap (Oct 2025–Present) with no clear explanation or relevant activity in AI/cloud strategy
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume emphasizes broad software engineering breadth over deep specialization in AI or cloud strategy, with no evidence of entrepreneurial/startup experience or recognized AI product leadership. The required 15-year timeline is not met, and the recent career gap suggests potential volatility. While technically skilled, the candidate’s profile aligns poorly with the AI strategy focus of the Principal Engineer role.
